verifications.details: Web API node telemetry endpoints (http://localhost:8000/metrics) responding
Critical service outages mapped to pager/email warning groups
Distributed spans successfully streamed to Jaeger/Zipkin collectors
Latency warning rules alert on p95 > 200ms dynamically
CPU/Memory gauges pulling telemetry stats every 10 seconds
